summary_line: Denver-based PE-backed national RIA roll-up — **$84.4B AUM, 1,429 employees, 632 advisors, 0 DRPs** — by far the largest firm in the entire catalog. Legal name 'MERCER GLOBAL ADVISORS INC.' Active acquirer of independent RIAs. Site capture returned 403 Forbidden (bot-blocked); analysis relies on IAPD + public knowledge.
regulatory_note: Site returned 403 Forbidden to extract.ts (bot-protection). Profile relies on IAPD/ADV data + public knowledge. Same pattern as ~8 other firms in the catalog with Cloudflare-style blocks.

notable_events.event: ADV snapshot via IAPD CRD 147363 — 1,429 employees, 632 advisors, $84,396,892,590 regulatory AUM, 0 DRPs. Legal name: 'MERCER GLOBAL ADVISORS INC.' By far the largest single firm in the catalog.

Site capture: extract.ts returned 403 Forbidden / nginx (Cloudflare-style bot protection). No homepage content captured. Profile relies on IAPD/ADV data + public knowledge (PE-backed national roll-up that has acquired dozens of independent RIAs over the past decade). Mercer is one of the prototype 'aggregator' RIAs alongside Focus Partners, Hightower, Captrust, Creative Planning.

_schema._applicability: Site data limited due to bot-block; profile content based on IAPD + public knowledge.
